lesson: Large markdown reference docs (api-docs.md, 9843 bytes) lost 56 bytes in transit through LLM prompt. The doc contained special characters, pipe tables, and code blocks. SKILL.md (1370 bytes) and Python script (6466 bytes) transferred perfectly. Lesson: code and structured config survive LLM transit intact; complex markdown with special formatting does not. For deterministic installs, consider base64 encoding large reference docs or transferring via a file-write script rather than embedding in prompt.
